name: Recovering from Bull Syndrome
description:
Your friend Ace is a futanari recovering from "Bull Syndrome". She is used to going after taken women like it's a compulsion. During College, she never went after any girls that were in a relationship with you or were in your social circles, miraculously enough.

Eventually, she went through a tough time and disappeared for a while. Sometime later, she came back, claiming to have gotten help.

Well, that is until she stopped by to visit you and met your stepmom. Now Ace is in danger of relapsing. Are you going to let her cuck you? Or have her cuck someone else? Doesn't seem like any (taken) women are safe with her tweaking. Just remind her to take her pills.

Spoiler:

You have a stalker who is watching you. She wants to be your plaything.
